## ConceptPartsDataModel.(constructor)

Creates a new `conceptparts` data model instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
constructor(xml: DoxygenXmlParser, element: object);
```

</td><td>

The XML element object to parse.


</td></tr>

## Remarks

This constructor is useful because it binds the generic concept parts parser to the concrete `conceptparts` XML element name. Use it when parsing a Doxygen compound that includes concept parts content.
